title: I.... am Steve
body:
Jack Black rappresents Steve in Minecraft Movie but what if we make him in the Game? here we are...
Frequently Asked Questions **DID YOU MAKE THIS SKIN?**
I want to make sure that **YOU KNOW** that the skin used in this pack **IS NOT MADE BY MYSELF**, [Click Here](https://it.namemc.com/skin/586e412b2aac4dce) to reach the original source of it, actually i had this idea after i seen that skin **IS THIS COMPATIBLE WITH F***** **TO NEW SKINS?**
Yes, this pack is compatible with my other pack [F*** to New Skins](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/f...-to-new-skins) but only if you download the FTNS version because the No FTNS version goes only to change Steve's appearence **WHAT THIS ACTUALLY DO?**
Basically, all the offline Steve skins get changed into Jack Black
